## Summary
- What changed and why?

## Linked Issue
- Closes #

## Change Type
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore

## Validation
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Local test run completed
- [ ] Manual verification completed

## Test Evidence
- Paste key outputs (test command results, screenshots, API responses, logs).

## Risks and Rollback
- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Primary risks:
- Rollback plan:
  - [ ] Revert commit(s)
  - [ ] Disable feature flag/config switch (if applicable)
  - [ ] Data migration rollback documented (if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] Meets acceptance criteria in linked issue
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data included
